mlx90642_init.message0: init MLX90642 %1 SDA %2 SCL %3 address %4 mode %5 refresh %6 output %7
mlx90642_init.tooltip: Initialize the MLX90642 32x24 thermal imaging sensor over ESP32 I2C.

mlx90642_data_ready.tooltip: Check whether a new thermal frame is ready.

mlx90642_read_frame.tooltip: Read the current 32x24 image frame into the cache.

mlx90642_measure_now.message0: MLX90642 %1 measure now and cache frame
mlx90642_measure_now.tooltip: Trigger one measurement and wait for the frame. Returns true on success.

mlx90642_pixel_value.message0: MLX90642 %1 cached pixel X %2 Y %3 read %4
mlx90642_pixel_value.tooltip: Read one pixel from the cached frame. X range 0-31, Y range 0-23.

mlx90642_frame_stat.tooltip: Calculate minimum, maximum, or average temperature from the cached frame.

mlx90642_print_frame_csv.message0: MLX90642 %1 print cached frame as CSV to %2 baud %3
mlx90642_print_frame_csv.tooltip: Print the cached 32x24 temperature frame as 24 CSV rows.

mlx90642_sleep.tooltip: Put the MLX90642 into low-power sleep mode.
